title.phon: om bar dö mön lam jik kyob ma shuk so
title.en: The Prayer To be Saved from the Fear of Bardo

source.attribution: Taught by Padmasambhava and revealed by Tertön Karma Lingpa at Daglha Gonpo Palri, per the colophon. English translation from The Stairway to the Pure Lands by Lopen Phuntsho Gyaltshen (2009).

blocks.phon:
om kyé ma dak ni tsé yi pen pa zé pé tsé
jik ten di né nyé dü mi tong té
blocks.en:
O alas! When the propellant of my life is exhausted,
Close relatives cannot be of any help,

blocks.phon:
rang nyi chik pur bar dor khyam tsam na
gyal wa shi trö tuk jé shuk chung né
blocks.en:
And when we, all alone linger about in the Bardo,
May the victorious peaceful and wrathful deities, muster their strength of compassion,

blocks.phon:
ma rik mün pé mak rum sel war shok
ga wé drok dang dral né chik pur khyam
blocks.en:
And dispel our dense darkness of ignorance!
Separated from a beloved friends, we linger about all alone,

blocks.phon:
rang nang tong pé zuk nyen char dü der
sang gyé nam kyi tuk jé shuk chung né
blocks.en:
And at the time when empty reflections of our own selves appear,
May the Buddhas direct the strength of their compassion,

blocks.phon:
ngang trak bar dö jik pa mi jung shok
yé shé sal wé ö nga char dü der
blocks.en:
And let not fear and terror of the Bardo arise!
At the time when the five lights of the gnosis arise,

blocks.phon:
mi jik mi trak rang ngo shé gyur shok
shi dang tro wö ku zuk char dü der
blocks.en:
May we self-recognize them without terror and fear!
At the time when the forms of the peaceful and wrathful deities appear,

blocks.phon:
mi jik ding tob bar do ngo shé shok
lé ngen wang gi duk ngal nyong tsam na
blocks.en:
May we obtain fearless confidence and recognize the state of Bardo!
When we go through suffering due to bad actions,

blocks.phon:
gyal wa shi trö duk ngal sel war shok
chö nyi rang dra druk tong dir tsam na
blocks.en:
May the victorious peaceful and wrathful deities dispel our suffering!
When the self-sound of the Dharmata resounds like a thousand thunders,

blocks.phon:
tek chen chö kyi dra ru gyur war shok
kyab mé lé kyi jé su drang dü der
blocks.en:
May it become the Dharma sound of the Great Vehicle!
At the time when we have to follow the consequences of actions without protection,

blocks.phon:
gyal wa shi trö dak sok kyab tu sol
bak chak lé kyi duk ngal nyong tsam na
blocks.en:
May the victorious peaceful and wrathful deities save us!
When we suffer due to actions of habitual propensities,

blocks.phon:
ö sal dé wé ting dzin char war shok
si pa bar dor dzü té kyé tsam na
blocks.en:
May it appear as the blissful Samadhi of luminosity!
When we take spontaneous rebirth in the period of the Bardo of Existence,

blocks.phon:
chin lok dü kyi lung ten mi jung shok
gang du sam pa wang gi leb tsam na
blocks.en:
May perverted and evil prophecies never occur!
When we arrive upon anywhere we think of,

blocks.phon:
lé ngen trul pé jik trak mi jung shok
chen zen tro wö ngar ké dön pé tsé
blocks.en:
May the terror and fear due to confused bad actions never occur!
At the time when fierce predatory beasts roar,

blocks.phon:
yi gé druk pé chö drar gyur war shok
kha char lung dang mün pé dé pé tsé
blocks.en:
May it become the Dharma sound of the Six-Lettered Mantra!
At the time when snow, down pours, storms and darkness drive us,

blocks.phon:
yé shé sal wé lha mik tong war shok
rik tün nang tsen bar dö sem chen kün
blocks.en:
May we see them through our divine eyes of gnosis!
Amongst the sentient beings belonging to the same Bardo,

blocks.phon:
mik ser mé ching to ri kyé war shok
shin tu nyön mong tré shing kom pé tsé
blocks.en:
May there be no jealousy and all take higher states of rebirths!
When we are extremely deluded and beaten by hunger and thirst,

blocks.phon:
tok kom tsa drang duk ngal mi jung shok
chi ma pa mé du trö tong tsam na
blocks.en:
May the suffering of hunger, thirst, cold and heat never occur!
When we see the mating of our future parents,

blocks.phon:
gyal wa shi tro yab yum nyi tong shok
gar kyé rang wang tob né shyen dön du
blocks.en:
May we see them as the victorious peaceful-wrathful father-mother deities!
Having obtained the freedom to take rebirth wherever we want,

blocks.phon:
tsen pé gyen pé lü chok tob par shok
dak nyi kyé pé lü chok tob gyur né
blocks.en:
May we attain the supreme body adorned with major and minor marks of excellences!
We, having obtained the supreme body of a man,

blocks.phon:
tong tö tam ché nyur du drol war shok
lé ngen tam ché jé su mi drang shying
blocks.en:
May we swiftly liberate all those who see and hear us!
With all bad actions not following us,

blocks.phon:
sö nam gang yö pel shying jé drang shok
gang dang gang du kyé wa dé dang der
blocks.en:
May whatever merits that we have increase and follow us!
Wherever we are born, then and there,

blocks.phon:
tsé rab yi dam lha dang jal war shok
kyé ma tak tu ma shying dro shé té
blocks.en:
May we see the tutelary deities of our successive rebirths!
Knowing how to walk and speak as soon as we are born,

blocks.phon:
kyé wa dren ching mi jé zung tob shok
yön ten ché chung dring dang na tsok pa
blocks.en:
May we recollect our life-times and obtain the unforgettable memory!
The various sciences of major, medium and of minor qualities,

blocks.phon:
tö sam tong wa tsam gyi shé gyur chik
gang du kyé wé yul der tra shi shok
blocks.en:
May we know them with just a mere look or listening!
May wherever we are born that place become auspicious!

blocks.phon:
sem chen tam ché dé dang den gyur chik
gyal wa shi tro khyé ku chi dra dang
blocks.en:
May all sentient beings become happy and possess happiness!
O the victorious peaceful and wrathful deities, just like how your bodies,

blocks.phon:
khor dang ku tsé tsé dang shying kham dang
khyé kyi tsen chok zang po chi dra wa
blocks.en:
Your retinues, life-span, pure land and,
Your excellently supreme names are,

blocks.phon:
dé dra kho nar dak sok gyur war shok
kün zang shi tro rab jam tuk jé dang
blocks.en:
Likewise, may others and I obtain them!
May with the compassion of the Samantabhadra and fathomless peaceful and wrathful deities,

blocks.phon:
chö nyi nam par dak pé den tob dang
ngak chang tsé chik drub pé jin lab kyi
blocks.en:
The power of truth of the purity of the Dharmata,
And the blessings of having accomplished as the mantra-holders one-pointedly,

blocks.phon: mön lam tab pa dé shyin drub gyur chik
blocks.en: Bring about the fulfillment of aspirations appropriately!

blocks.phon: dé tar bar do druk gi tsa tsik dang drel wé shyal dam / bar do trang drol dang bar dö jik kyob kyi mön lam ché / ur gyen gyi khen po pé ma jung né kyi dzé pa khor wa ma tong bar du ma dzok so / sa ma ya / drub tob kar ma ling pé dak lha gam po pal gyi ri wo né den drang pa'o
blocks.en: These prayers of "the Root Verses and Instructions of the Six Bardos," "the Prayer of Freedom from the Precipitous Path of the Bardo, and "the Prayer to Be Saved from the Fear of Bardo," were taught by Odiayanese Acharya Padmasambhava, and this teachings will never exhaust until the Samsara is emptied! Mantra-adept Terton Karma Lingpa from its concealment at Daglha Gonpo Palri revealed this treasure. From The Stairway to the Pure Lands translated by Lopen Phuntsho Gyaltshen 2009.
